provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Export Credit Re-Insurance Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: a contract of re-insurance entered into in terms of an agreement referred to in section 3
the Export Credit Re-insurance Fund established under section 4
the Minister responsible for commerce and industry
any Government agency or semi-Government agency

any transaction (including a transaction for the rendering of a service) involving a consideration in money or money's worth accruing from a person in the course of carrying on business or other activities outside Botswana to a person carrying on business in Botswana and any consignment of goods to a person carrying on business or other activities outside Botswana with a view to such a transaction.
